title: centella stipitata
intro: Centella stipitata, also known as Gotu Kola, is a type of plant native to East Asia and India, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. The medicinal properties of Centella stipitata lie in its high concentration of triterpenoid saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and neuroprotective effects. The health benefits of Centella stipitata include improved cognitive function, enhanced memory, and reduced symptoms of anxiety and depression, as well as promoting skin health and wound healing. Centella stipitata is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, and is also added to skincare products for its anti-aging and moisturizing properties.
